da8bf3df-c591-4641-ae7a-085b7201d782.text:
CONFIDENTIALITY AND NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This Confidentiality and Non-Disclosure Agreement (“ Agreement ”) is entered into on  [INSERT DATE], 2016  (“ Effective Date ”), by and between Media News Group, Inc.  and its subsidiaries and affiliates (collectively, the “ Disclosing Party ”) and  [NAME OF COMPANY],  and its subsidiaries and affiliates (collectively, the “ Recipient ”).

ca93a966-4796-480a-84d9-d922c02f5298.label: text_chunk

5d81471d-5def-411d-8018-eadef1d5943a.label: text_chunk
5d81471d-5def-411d-8018-eadef1d5943a.text:
and
WHEREAS, the Disclosing Party desires to disclose such information to the Recipient, subject to the terms and conditions of this Agreement.

NOW, THEREFORE , in consideration of the foregoing and the mutual covenants, representations, warranties, agreements and promises hereinafter set forth, and for other good and valuable consideration, the receipt and sufficiency of which are hereby acknowledged, the Parties agree to the foregoing and as follows:
1.

b252cf2c-5372-42b6-a811-87788ca12708.label: text_chunk
b252cf2c-5372-42b6-a811-87788ca12708.text: The term “ Confidential Information ” shall mean any confidential, proprietary, financial or otherwise non-public information, in written or electronic form, relating to the Disclosing Party, or the Purpose that is disclosed before, on or after the Effective Date, by the Disclosing Party to the Recipient or its affiliates, or to any of such Recipient’s or its affiliates’ employees, officers, directors, partners, shareholders, agents, attorneys, accountants or advisors (collectively, “ Representatives ”),

6e57b001-319c-4087-a63a-195db9efabb7.label: text_chunk
6e57b001-319c-4087-a63a-195db9efabb7.text: whether disclosed or accessed in written, electronic or other form, including, without limitation: (a) information concerning the Disclosing Party’s and its affiliates’ business affairs, finances, forecasts, sales and other financial results, records and budgets, and business, marketing, development, sales and other commercial strategies; and (b) notes, analyses, compilations, reports, forecasts, data, statistics, summaries, interpretations and other materials prepared by or for Recipient or its Representatives that contain,

f2d99074-54a9-4e00-b43a-228d64e19a9c.label: text_chunk
f2d99074-54a9-4e00-b43a-228d64e19a9c.text:
are based on, or otherwise reflect or are derived, in whole or in part, from any of the foregoing.

 Confidential Information provided by Disclosing Party must be expressly marked or designated in writing by the Disclosing Party in a manner to indicate its confidential, proprietary or otherwise non-public nature.2.

34a1b342-7a3c-4b02-994e-066f677296fa.label: text_chunk
34a1b342-7a3c-4b02-994e-066f677296fa.text: Recipient shall  protect and safeguard the confidentiality of all such Confidential Information with at least the same degree of care as the Recipient would protect its own Confidential Information, but in no event with less than a commercially reasonable degree of care to protect and safeguard the confidentiality of all such Confidential Information.3.

5b124e37-0df3-4e94-95ac-03016a4d3a9d.label: text_chunk
5b124e37-0df3-4e94-95ac-03016a4d3a9d.text: Recipient shall not, and shall cause its Representatives not to, (a) disclose all or any portion of Confidential Information to any third parties (other than to its Representatives who need to know the Confidential Information to assist Recipient in its evaluation  of the Purpose),  or (b) use or permit any Confidential Information to be accessed or used for any purpose other than for the evaluation of the Purpose. Recipient will be responsible for any breach of the terms of this Agreement caused by its Representatives.

794635d6-a163-478e-83f5-85e865875dd6.label: text_chunk
794635d6-a163-478e-83f5-85e865875dd6.text: Notwithstanding anything to the contrary contained in this Agreement, Disclosing Party acknowledges and agrees that (a) the Recipient is expressly authorized to disclose the Confidential Information to certain lenders and investors, in furtherance of Recipient’s performance of its obligations with respect to the Purpose and (b) under no circumstances will Recipient have any liability for any disclosure by such lenders or investors of any of the Confidential Information.4.

8db2b594-5a62-4f61-928a-7dc5b012ce00.label: text_chunk
8db2b594-5a62-4f61-928a-7dc5b012ce00.text:
Except as otherwise provided in this Agreement, without the prior written consent of the Disclosing Party, Recipient shall not disclose to any person or entity (other than its Representatives who are
involved in its evaluation of the Purpose) any information with respect to the occurrence or content of any discussions or negotiations between the Parties.5.

fdb685b6-50be-42e6-a6cd-a8ec770d558e.label: text_chunk
fdb685b6-50be-42e6-a6cd-a8ec770d558e.text: Recipient may disclose the Confidential Information in the event and to the extent Recipient reasonably believes any Confidential Information is required to be disclosed by Recipient under the terms of: (i) a valid and effective subpoena; (ii) a statute or regulation binding upon Recipient; (iii) an order issued by a court of competent jurisdiction; or (iv) by a demand or information request from an executive, regulatory or administrative agency or other governmental authority.

442ca89e-1ee6-4045-b7bd-7812ad66ae75.label: text_chunk
442ca89e-1ee6-4045-b7bd-7812ad66ae75.text: Recipient shall endeavor to promptly notify the Disclosing Party of the existence, terms and circumstances surrounding such potential disclosure unless recipient reasonably believes that applicable law prohibits Recipient from informing the Disclosing Party of the potential disclosure.6.

340ff11a-8857-4fff-940d-ab3a9fcc4b72.label: text_chunk
340ff11a-8857-4fff-940d-ab3a9fcc4b72.text: Recipient understands and agrees that neither the Disclosing Party nor any person or entity delivering the Confidential Information on behalf of Disclosing Party is making any representation or warranty, express or implied, as to the accuracy or completeness of any information furnished or to be furnished by it to Recipient (any representation or warranty with respect thereto must be set forth or provided for in a definitive agreement between the parties, if any is entered into in connection with the Purpose  or certification from Disclosing Party).7.

03256c26-9104-40d7-8a44-2002bd5bcad9.label: text_chunk
03256c26-9104-40d7-8a44-2002bd5bcad9.text: For purposes of this Agreement, “Confidential Information” shall not include any information which (a) is or becomes publicly available, other than through disclosure by Recipient in violation of this Agreement, (b) was known or available to Recipient prior to disclosure pursuant hereto, (c) was independently developed by Recipient without reference to the Confidential Information disclosed to it pursuant hereto, or (d) in the future is received from a third party who,

305f9724-0832-4b4e-9031-53d8da73a2cc.label: text_chunk
305f9724-0832-4b4e-9031-53d8da73a2cc.text:
to the knowledge of Recipient at the time of disclosure, is under no obligation of confidentiality with respect thereto.

8. Recipient hereby further agrees that, in the event of its breach or threatened breach of this Agreement, the Disclosing Party would suffer irreparable harm and the Disclosing Party’s remedies shall include, in addition to any other remedies available at law or in equity, equitable remedies such as specific performance and injunctive relief and shall not be limited to monetary damages.

204480f7-799d-4714-99ed-95c8e14ab2f4.label: text_chunk
204480f7-799d-4714-99ed-95c8e14ab2f4.text:
Specifically, the Disclosing Party shall be entitled to seek immediate injunctive relief prohibiting such violation.9.

 Nothing contained in this Agreement shall be construed as granting or conferring any rights by way of license or otherwise in or to any Confidential Information disclosed pursuant hereto.  The disclosure or receipt of information pursuant hereto in no way obligates either Party to agree to any business transaction, whether or not relating to the Purpose.10.

03606d24-6466-4a9e-8e28-8129846beb00.label: text_chunk
03606d24-6466-4a9e-8e28-8129846beb00.text:
Neither Party may assign, transfer or sell any of its rights under this Agreement, or delegate any of its obligations hereunder without the prior written consent of the other Party.

  Each Party understands and agrees that no failure or delay by the other in exercising any of its rights or remedies hereunder will operate as a waiver thereof, nor will any waiver in any instance constitute a waiver with respect to any other instance.11.

b62c4b77-023c-4dad-850a-191f3423001a.label: text_chunk
b62c4b77-023c-4dad-850a-191f3423001a.text: Upon request of the Disclosing Party (which request may be made at any time upon reasonable notice), Recipient will destroy (or, if stored electronically, purge) or deliver to the Disclosing Party all copies of written Confidential Information (except for that portion of the Confidential Information that may be found in analysis, compilation, or other documents prepared by Recipient) in Recipient’s possession.

361fe296-3d41-4582-a727-26b009b272c2.label: text_chunk
361fe296-3d41-4582-a727-26b009b272c2.text: That portion of the Confidential Information that may be found in analysis, compilations and other documents prepared by Recipient will continue to be subject to the terms of this Agreement or shall be destroyed (or, if stored electronically, purged). Notwithstanding the foregoing, Recipient may retain copies of Confidential Information that it reasonably believes it is required to retain under applicable laws, banking regulations and internal policies of which relate to any services provided to the Disclosing Party.

984b5b4b-5cb2-4dd1-9716-7bb3c2d6dfb5.label: text_chunk
984b5b4b-5cb2-4dd1-9716-7bb3c2d6dfb5.text:
This Agreement shall terminate upon the earliest of (i) one (1) year from the date hereof, (ii) the date all Confidential Information is destroyed by Recipient or returned to the Disclosing Party, or (iii) upon the closing of any transaction between Recipient and
- 2 -
the Disclosing Party for credit accommodations or banking services, at which time duties of confidentiality shall be determined by the transaction agreements and applicable law.12.

5d051626-5407-4b96-8582-b26d718ef21c.label: text_chunk
5d051626-5407-4b96-8582-b26d718ef21c.text: If any provision of this Agreement is determined to be in violation of applicable law, then such provision shall be void and the other provisions of this Agreement shall remain in full force and effect.  This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement of the Parties with respect to the subject matter hereof.

6e10053e-aab8-461c-8a31-9ce214fd2838.label: text_chunk
6e10053e-aab8-461c-8a31-9ce214fd2838.text: This Agreement shall be interpreted in accordance with the laws of the State of New York without regard to the principles of conflict of laws to the extent that such principles would permit or require the application of laws of another jurisdiction.

cb3e0508-cf50-456f-a7d3-f7b929700520.label: text_chunk
cb3e0508-cf50-456f-a7d3-f7b929700520.text:

community_summary.1:
**Summary of Relationships:**

1. **Disclosing Party and Recipient**: The Disclosing Party shares and provides confidential information to the Recipient to facilitate the evaluation of potential investments or financing. This information encompasses business affairs, financial results, and commercial strategies. The Recipient is obligated to manage this information in accordance with the terms outlined in their agreement.

2. **Disclosing Party and Agreement**: The relationship between the Disclosing Party and the Agreement establishes the framework governing the disclosure of information. The Agreement specifies the terms and conditions under which the Disclosing Party is responsible for sharing confidential information.

Overall, the Disclosing Party plays a crucial role in providing sensitive information to the Recipient, while the Agreement ensures that this exchange is conducted under clearly defined rules and responsibilities.
community_summary.2:
The relationships outlined involve two primary entities: the Parties, which consist of the Disclosing Party and the Recipient, and the Agreement that governs their interactions. 

1. **Bound by Agreement**: The Parties are bound by the terms of the Agreement, which delineates their responsibilities and interactions concerning confidential information. This establishes a legal framework for their relationship.

2. **Consent to Jurisdiction**: The Parties consent to the jurisdiction and venue in New York for any legal proceedings that may arise from the Agreement. This indicates their mutual agreement on where legal matters related to the Agreement will be addressed.

In summary, the Parties are legally obligated to adhere to the terms of the Agreement regarding confidentiality and have agreed to resolve any disputes in New York, highlighting the formal and binding nature of their relationship.
community_summary.3:
### Summary of Relationships Involving the Recipient and the Disclosing Party

1. **Entities Involved**: Recipient, Disclosing Party, Representatives, Investors
   - **Nature of Relationships**:
     - The **Recipient** receives confidential information from the **Disclosing Party**, which is utilized for analyses and reports.
     - The **Recipient** is responsible for protecting this confidential information, ensuring its confidentiality, and safeguarding it from unauthorized access.
     - The **Recipient** authorizes its **Representatives** to access this information to assist in evaluating the purpose of the agreement.
     - The **Recipient** is also permitted to disclose confidential information to **investors** as part of its obligations under the agreement.
     - The **Representatives** act on behalf of the **Recipient** in evaluating the purpose, indicating a relationship of representation and responsibility.
     - The **Recipient** must comply with legal obligations, such as disclosing information in response to a subpoena, and is required to notify the **Disclosing Party** about potential disclosures.
     - The **Recipient** agrees to the terms set by the **Disclosing Party** regarding the handling of confidential information and is bound by the terms of their agreement, which includes confidentiality obligations and remedies for breaches.
     - Additionally, the **Recipient** engages in transaction agreements with the **Disclosing Party** for credit accommodations or banking services.

This summary encapsulates the critical aspects of the relationships, emphasizing the responsibilities and obligations of the Recipient in relation to the confidential information received from the Disclosing Party.

community_summary.10:
**Summary of Relationships Involving the United States Government**

1. **Grants Access**: The United States Government provides conditional access to information through an Agreement, establishing a legal framework for information protection.

2. **Uses DHS Form 11000-6**: The United States Government employs DHS Form 11000-6 to ensure compliance with information handling and safeguarding standards as stipulated in various agreements.

3. **Assignment of Rights**: In a legal context, the speaker assigns all royalties and remunerations to the United States Government, indicating a relationship where SSI is involved in disclosing information that generates financial benefits.

4. **Enforcement Authority**: The United States Government holds the authority to enforce agreements related to Protected Critical Infrastructure Information (PCII), which involves oversight of the Authorized Entity.

5. **Remedies Against Authorized Entity**: The United States Government can seek remedies against the Authorized Entity to ensure compliance with the terms of the Agreement, highlighting its role in overseeing adherence to legal obligations.

6. **Regulatory Oversight**: The United States Government has regulatory authority over the Authorized Entity, particularly concerning the management of sensitive information and compliance with applicable laws and regulations.

These relationships illustrate the United States Government's role in managing information access, compliance, and enforcement within a legal framework, emphasizing its authority and regulatory responsibilities.

2. **Relatedness**: Both SSI and SBU are classified as categories of sensitive information that necessitate protection from unauthorized disclosure. This indicates a shared significance in terms of information sensitivity and the need for stringent security measures.

In summary, SSI and SBU are closely linked through their collaborative efforts and shared status as sensitive information categories, emphasizing the importance of protecting these types of data from unauthorized access.

Section 1034 specifically protects military personnel, while the Military Whistleblower Protection Act offers broader protections applicable to various disclosures.

Overall, these relationships highlight the legal frameworks designed to protect employee rights and ensure the safety of whistleblowers, particularly in military contexts.

The relationship between the Act and the amendment highlights the importance of legal frameworks in supporting whistleblower rights.

The relationships outlined highlight the significant impact of the Woolsey Fire on various infrastructure projects in the area. 

1. **Guardrail Replacement Citywide**: This project was initiated due to damage caused by the Woolsey Fire, which affected guardrails throughout the city.

2. **Latigo Canyon Road Culvert Repairs**: The storm drain on Latigo Canyon Road suffered damage from the Woolsey Fire, prompting the need for repairs.

3. **Encinal Canyon Road Drainage Improvements**: Similar to the previous projects, this initiative is a direct response to the damage inflicted by the Woolsey Fire on drainage systems.

Overall, the Woolsey Fire has been a catalyst for multiple infrastructure repair and improvement projects, specifically targeting damaged guardrails and drainage systems in the affected areas.
